people.title_jp: 代表社員 税理士 行政書士
people.title_en: Representative Member, Tax Accountant, Administrative Scrivener

research_notes: Found executive information on company introduction page. Amiel is a tax corporation (税理士法人) with Representative Member 留目津 who is also a Tax Accountant and Administrative Scrivener. Lists two affiliated tax accountants: 田中 健一 and 阿部 和二. All information sourced from official company website.
